title: What we do sets us apart.
description: Our materials are structured to help you improve and turn every mistake into a learning opportunity. Every question in our course has explanations for the right and wrong answers because Gleim helps you understand the concepts behind the questions. Our approach has been vetted by authors with prestigious university careers—passionate educators who have spent their lives training new generations of accounting professionals.You’ll learn quickly, but more importantly, you’ll build a deep understanding of the topics that will serve you throughout your accounting career.
